resposta:
```python
class Solution:
    def isBoomerang(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> bool:
        x1, y1 = points[0]
        x2, y2 = points[1]
        x3, y3 = points[2]
        return (y2-y1)*(x3-x2) != (x2-x1)*(y3-y2)
solution: 
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation:  Determines if three points form a boomerang by calculating the slope between each pair of points. If the slopes are different, the points are not collinear and form a boomerang.
code:
def isBoomerang(self, points: List[List[int]]) -> bool:
        x1, y1 = points[0]
        x2, y2 = points[1]
        x3, y3 = points[2]
        return (y2-y1)*(x3-x2) != (x2-x1)*(y3-y2)
